title: Pings+
description: A Texture-Pack for Redesigning the ping Icons for a more modern and fresh look.
body:
![Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ecc9eb35a2419f9d1f2ec6b99e2690280b5f255c.jpeg)
# 🔸**Features**
- Recoloring Ping icons
- New Animation for loading icon
- Changed some icons
# 🖼️ **Icons** _(Icons are small, zoom needed)_
- Ping 5: ![Ping 5](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/87c61b079d2967424dfd0a631c5967a4c02be2b2.png)
- Ping 4: ![Ping 4](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c41a60e76def093b16bf19a721f84b1156bbfe70.png)
- Ping 3: ![Ping 3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/40d84ef3081e1b94f53aea924380f32f30943a3c.png)
- Ping 2: ![Ping 2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e811df0d208021a98f650467e659ac8d4b5f33df.png)
- Ping 1: ![Ping 1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/009703c1d96937c992c394e366852775fa3006a2.png)
- Pinging(Black version for viewing in light mode): ![Pinging](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b93a38ff1a365e3db650eb065025d38f87146c63.gif)
- Incompatible: ![Incompatible](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/80e0dfa8eec139752ac4265177902744a5d33e17.png)
- Unreachable: ![Unreachable](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0c76c6e4f3dca9515cac6d23b111348b3cd0cf2a.png)
